# Plan â€” 2026-06-01

Source research: `.github/research/2026-06-01-research.md`

The 2026-05-30 cycle closed all 6 carry-over items. This cycle picks up the
five new gaps surfaced by upstream activity (claude-code v2.1.158/159, kilocode
7.3.18, cline #11127/#11166, continuedev #11813). All five are tractable inside
the 5-issue cap.

## Plan details

### Issue 1 â€” extend per-dir AGENTS.md to write/edit/multiedit/grep
- `src/agent/system.ts:274 instructionsForPath` already does the path walk, the
  realpath dedup, and the depth cap; only `src/tool/tools/read.ts:55-76` calls
  it today. Wire the same helper into `edit.ts`, `multiedit.ts`, `write.ts`
  on successful write, and into `grep.ts` for matched files.
- Tests mirror `src/tool/tools/__tests__/read.agentsmd.test.ts`.

### Issue 2 â€” ALEXI_SESSION_ID + ALEXICODE in MCP stdio env
- `src/mcp/client.ts:159-181 connectStdio` already merges
  `ALEXI_PROJECT_DIR` ahead of user `env`. Add `ALEXI_SESSION_ID` (threaded
  via `McpConnectOptions.sessionId`) and `ALEXICODE: '1'`. Mirror the
  `CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID` / `CLAUDECODE=1` pattern from claude-code v2.1.154.

### Issue 3 â€” workdir on SessionMetadata + filter
- Add optional `workdir?: string` to `SessionMetadata`
  (`src/core/sessionManager.ts:22-30`), populate in `createSession()`, add
  `listSessions(opts?: { workdir?: string })` filter, and add
  `--here` / `--workdir <dir>` / `--all` flags to `alexi sessions`
  (`src/cli/commands/sessions.ts`). Default behavior unchanged â€” flags opt in.

### Issue 4 â€” system-rg fast-path
- `src/tool/tools/grep.ts` always uses the JS recursive walk. When `rg` is on
  PATH, dispatch `rg --json --no-heading --line-number ...` and parse the
  match shape. Feature-detect with a 200ms `rg --version` probe, cache. Honor
  `ALEXI_DISABLE_RG=1` to force the JS path. Falls back gracefully when rg is
  absent or spawn fails.

### Issue 5 â€” plugin rule contributions (schema + inline/file)
- Extend `PluginManifest` in `src/plugin/index.ts` with `rules?: PluginRule[]`
  where each rule is `{ name, scope?: 'session'|'always',
  source: 'inline'|'file', content?: string, path?: string }`. Loader reads
  enabled plugins' rules and appends them to system-prompt assembly in
  `src/agent/system.ts` *after* the AGENTS.md block (so AGENTS.md still wins
  on conflicts). `command` source is deferred to a follow-up.

## Out-of-scope this cycle

- Auto-mode classifier on Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry (claude-code v2.1.158): SAP
  AI Core does not expose an equivalent; re-check next cycle.
- OTEL `tool_decision`/`tool_parameters` events: no downstream consumer.
- `MessageDisplay` hook, `claude agents` PR column, background-agent surface,
  dynamic workflows: no Alexi parity demand.
- Plugin marketplace `defaultEnabled: false`: defer until marketplace exists.
- Opus 4.8 SAP AI Core model id: tracker only â€” no code change today.
- POSIX `cd`/`pushd`/subshell permission audit (carry-over from 2026-05-29):
  not in this cycle; surface in next planning if still open.
